  • Uses of DbRefResolver in org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.convert

    Classes in org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.convert that implement DbRefResolver
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DefaultDbRefResolver
    A DbRefResolver that resolves DBRefs by delegating to a DbRefResolverCallback than is able to generate lazy loading proxies.
    enum 
    NoOpDbRefResolver
    No-Operation DBRef resolver throwing UnsupportedOperationException when attempting to resolve database references.

    Modifier and Type

    Description

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default <S,T> @Nullable T
    MongoConverter.mapValueToTargetType(S source, Class<T> targetType, DbRefResolver dbRefResolver)
    Mapping function capable of converting values into a desired target type by eg. extracting the actual java type from a given BsonValue.

    Modifier

    Description
     
    MappingMongoConverter(DbRefResolver dbRefResolver, MappingContext<? extends MongoPersistentEntity<?>, MongoPersistentProperty> mappingContext)
